article_title: B.C. Reg. 285/2024 – British Columbia Assessment Authority

briefs.title: BC Assessment Authority Regulation 285/2024 Amended — Property Assessment Rules Updated
briefs.summary: B.C. Reg. 285/2024 amends rules governing the BC Assessment Authority, published December 17, 2024. Changes may affect how properties are assessed and valued across British Columbia.
briefs.action_required: Review the amended regulation to determine if your property assessments or obligations are affected.
briefs.industries: Landlord & Property Mgmt, Construction & Development, Finance & Insurance
